title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 39. OCCUPATIONAL THERAPY

PART I. OCCUPATIONAL THERAPISTS

§3001. Short title

            This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the Louisiana Occupational Therapy Practice Act.

            Acts 1979, No. 566, §1; Acts 2023, No. 263, §§1, 2, eff. Jan. 1, 2024.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 39.  OCCUPATIONAL THERAPY
PART I.  OCCUPATIONAL THERAPISTS
§3001.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the Louisiana Occupational Therapy
Practice Act.
Acts 1979, No. 566, §1; Acts 2023, No. 263, §§1, 2, eff. Jan. 1, 2024.
